284 I2100_SPTCMIA_CD I2100_SPTCMIA_CD I2100 Active Diagnoses: Septicemia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of septicemia in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information

285 I2200_TB_CD I2200_TB_CD I2200 Active Diagnoses: Tuberculosis Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of tuberculosis
